About Patrick

20 Years of Wonder

Patrick Bolen is a professional magician and illusionist based in West Chicago, Illinois, with over 20 years of performing experience. His signature style blends comedy, mystery, and jaw-dropping illusions into shows that entertain the whole family — from the youngest audience member to the most skeptical adult in the room.

Patrick has performed on the stages of some of Chicagoland’s most beloved venues, including Freedom Hall in Park Forest, the Steel Beam Theatre in St. Charles, and is now a featured performer at Center Stage Theater in Naperville, Illinois.

Whether you’re looking to headline an event, entertain a private gathering, or bring wonder to a corporate function, Patrick delivers a fully professional, high-energy experience tailored to your audience every time.

20+Years Performing
3Major Theatres
∞Moments of Wonder
The Difference

Why Patrick?

🎯 Personalized Every Time

Patrick works with the audience, the venue, and the event to make each show a personalized experience. No two shows are ever the same — every performance is crafted specifically for you.

😄 Comedy Meets Mystery

Patrick’s unique combination of comedy and mystery makes every show special. Audiences laugh, gasp, and leave talking — the perfect blend of entertainment for any crowd.

🌟 Fully Professional

From the first inquiry to the final bow, Patrick brings professionalism, reliability, and genuine showmanship to every engagement. He arrives prepared, performs flawlessly, and leaves audiences delighted.

👪 Family Friendly

Clean, inclusive, and fun for all ages — Patrick’s shows are safe for kids and genuinely entertaining for adults. Everyone in the room gets to share in the wonder together.

Flexible Formats

Show Lengths

30 Minutes

A fast-paced, high-impact set — ideal for cocktail hours, corporate mixers, or as a warm-up act.

45 Minutes

A complete, satisfying experience with room for audience interaction and a memorable finale.

60 Minutes

The full headline experience — packed with illusions, comedy, and unforgettable moments.

90 Minutes

An extended evening of magic — perfect for theater engagements and special ticketed events.

Booking Options

Headliner & Opener

⭐

Headliner

Patrick can headline your event as the featured entertainment — commanding the stage for a full evening of comedy magic that keeps your audience captivated from start to finish. Perfect for corporate galas, theater nights, private parties, and community events.

🎙

Opener & Intro Act

Patrick is available to open your event and introduce your CEO, keynote speaker, or featured band with a burst of energy and wonder. He warms up the room, gets the crowd engaged, and hands the stage off on a high note — setting the perfect tone for what follows.

Show Formats

Stage Show — Comedy & Illusion

Patrick’s signature full-length theatrical production — a hilarious and jaw-dropping blend of comedy, storytelling, and grand illusions designed for the whole family.

Close-Up & Card Magic

Intimate, astonishing magic performed inches from your guests — with cards, coins, and everyday objects that defy every possible explanation.
